title: collabium ovalifolium
side_effects: Collabium ovalifolium can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to its toxic alkaloids may also cause liver damage and other systemic problems. Improper handling and preparation of the plant can also lead to skin irritation and allergic reactions.
